intent: Clear, calm, high-efficiency SaaS interface for repeated daily work.
layoutRules: Prefer scan-friendly work surfaces over decorative sections.
Use full-width bands or panels, not nested floating cards.
Keep navigation persistent for products with more than three primary workflows.

cards: Use only for repeated items or bounded panels
modals: Use focused forms and direct actions
charts: Use restrained color and strong labels
states: Empty states should be useful, not decorative

interactionRules: Hover states should clarify affordance without shifting layout.
accessibilityRules: Maintain WCAG AA contrast for text.
Do not rely on color alone for status.
avoid: large pill-shaped controls unless already established
imagePromptStyle: A crisp light SaaS product interface, white surfaces, pale slate background, blue accent, dense but calm layout, precise spacing, practical controls, no decorative gradient blobs.
